headings: IV. Insurance Policy Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions.
text: - e. Allocation . In the event more than one Involved Party is involved in the occurrence or offense, Owner may, in its sole discretion, allocate the CGL Deductible and/or the  Builder's  Risk  Deductible amongst  the  Involved  Parties.  Neither  the  CGL Deductible Contribution nor the Builder's Risk Deductible Contribution
